item.title: ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 3,428 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its recent rally, ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd surged 4.02% on 21 Apr 2026 to touch a fresh all-time high of Rs 3,428.95, significantly outpacing the Sensex gain of 0.88% on the same day. This milestone caps a strong run that has seen the stock outperform its sector and the broader market over multiple timeframes. Time: 9 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1039
item.description: With a 64.35% surge over the past year, Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd has decisively broken through its previous ceilings to hit a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1039 on 21 Apr 2026, outpacing the Sensex which has remained nearly flat over the same period. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Tata Power Company Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 438.7
item.description: With a sustained seven-day rally delivering a 10.44% gain, Tata Power Company Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 438.7 on 21 Apr 2026, outpacing the broader Sensex which rose 0.94% on the day. This milestone caps a year-long ascent from its 52-week low of Rs 342.35, marking an 11.32% return against the Sensex’s marginal decline of 0.19% over the same period. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts AXISCADES Technologies Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1925
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, AXISCADES Technologies Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 1925 on 21 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 121.7% gain over the past year. This milestone reflects a powerful momentum driven by a confluence of technical indicators aligning strongly across multiple timeframes. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Integrated Proteins Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 93.42
item.description: With a remarkable 69.85% gain over the past 21 trading sessions, Integrated Proteins Ltd surged to a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 93.42 on 21 Apr 2026, showcasing a powerful momentum that has captivated market attention despite a modest underperformance relative to its sector today. Time: 17 minutes ago

item.title: From Gap-Down to Record Close: Integrated Proteins Ltd Touches All-Time High at Rs 93.42
item.description: Integrated Proteins Ltd, a micro-cap player in the edible oil sector, reached a significant milestone on 21 April 2026 by hitting an all-time high price of Rs.93.42. This marks a remarkable phase in the company’s market journey, reflecting sustained gains and a strong bullish trend over recent months. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: LG Electronics India Ltd Surges 3.56% to Day's High — Extends Winning Streak Amid Broad Market Gains
item.description: The Sensex climbed 0.89% on 21 Apr 2026, yet LG Electronics India Ltd outpaced the benchmark with a 3.56% gain, marking its seventh consecutive day of positive returns. This 0.25 percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a stock-specific momentum that merits closer examination. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Radico Khaitan Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 21 Apr 2026
item.description: Radico Khaitan Ltd. experienced a notable intraday decline on 21 Apr 2026, with the stock touching a low of Rs 3,195, reflecting a 4.55% drop from its previous close. This downturn occurred despite a broadly positive market environment, as the Sensex advanced by 0.89% during the session. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: AXISCADES Technologies Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 1,925 as Momentum Accelerates
item.description: AXISCADES Technologies Ltd has reached a significant milestone by touching an all-time high price of ₹1,925.00 on 21 April 2026, reflecting a remarkable journey of sustained growth and strong financial metrics within the Computers - Software & Consulting sector. Time: 32 minutes ago

item.title: Grauer & Weil (India) Ltd Surges 10.55% to Day's High of Rs 70.25 — Outperforms Sector by 1.29 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 0.92% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Grauer & Weil (India) Ltd surged 10.55%, outperforming its Commodity Chemicals sector by 1.29 percentage points. This sharp single-session gain stands out as a stock-specific event amid a broadly positive market backdrop. Time: 41 minutes ago

item.title: SML Mahindra Ltd Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 21 Apr 2026
item.description: SML Mahindra Ltd experienced a significant intraday decline on 21 Apr 2026, touching a low of Rs 4,011, reflecting a sharp price correction of 7.26% amid broader market gains. The stock underperformed its sector and the Sensex, facing immediate selling pressure despite a positive market environment. Time: 41 minutes ago

item.title: Skipper Ltd Surges 7.82% to Day's High of Rs 473 — Outperforms Sector by 6.85 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 0.92% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Skipper Ltd outpaced the market with a robust 7.82% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 473. This 6.85-percentage-point outperformance over its Heavy Electrical Equipment sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum rather than a broad market lift. Time: 41 minutes ago

item.title: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 1,033.90 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its impressive rally, Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd surged 3.24% on 21 Apr 2026 to close at a fresh all-time high of Rs 1,033.90, outpacing the Sensex which gained a modest 0.84% on the day. This milestone caps a remarkable run where the stock has outperformed its sector and the broader market across multiple timeframes. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: ICICI Prudential AMC Rallies 3.18% to Rs 3,400, Outperforming Sector by 2.46 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.8% on 21 Apr 2026, yet ICICI Prudential Asset Management Co Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 3.18% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 3,400. This 2.46 percentage-point outperformance over its Capital Markets sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific strength rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: All Time Plastics Ltd Surges 7.73% to Day's High of Rs 231.65 — Outperforms Sector by 8.1 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.80% on 21 Apr 2026, yet All Time Plastics Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.73% gain, marking a significant 8.1 percentage-point outperformance over its sector peers. This sharp intraday surge to a high of Rs 231.65 stands out amid a backdrop of recent volatility and raises the question of whether this is a genuine breakout or a technical bounce within a mixed trend. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Muthoot Microfin Ltd Surges 8.79% to Day's High of Rs 189 — Outperforms Sector by 9.12 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.80% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Muthoot Microfin Ltd outpaced the broader market with an 8.79% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 189. This 9.12-percentage-point outperformance over its Finance sector peers highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Five-Star Business Finance Ltd Surges 9.29% to Day's High of Rs 509.85 — Outperforms Sector by 7.57 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.80% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Five-Star Business Finance Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 9.29% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 509.85. This 7.57-percentage-point outperformance over its NBFC sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Ethos Ltd Surges 7.17% to Day's High of Rs 2523.35 — Outperforms Sector by 6.37 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.80% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Ethos Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.17% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 2523.35. This 6.37 percentage-point outperformance over its Gems, Jewellery And Watches sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Vishnu Chemicals Ltd Surges 7.66% to Day's High of Rs 615 — Outperforms Sector by 6.38 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.80% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Vishnu Chemicals Ltd outpaced the broader market with a robust 7.66% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 615. This 6.38-percentage-point outperformance over its Specialty Chemicals sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 56 minutes ago

item.title: Kirloskar Industries Ltd Surges 7.14% to Day's High of Rs 3286 — Outperforms Sector by 6.42 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.80% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Kirloskar Industries Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.14% gain, reaching an intraday peak of Rs 3286. This 6.42-percentage-point outperformance signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a mere market lift. Time: 56 minutes ago
